testInfo.title: TOEIC Placement Test
testInfo.description: Bài test xếp trình độ TOEIC đầu vào

parts.title: Photographs
parts.description: Nghe 4 câu miêu tả ngắn về một bức tranh và chọn câu miêu tả đúng nhất.

parts.title: Question - Response
parts.description: Nghe một câu hỏi hoặc câu nói, sau đó nghe 3 câu trả lời. Chọn câu trả lời phù hợp.

parts.title: Conversations
parts.description: Nghe các đoạn hội thoại ngắn trong bối cảnh công việc. Mỗi đoạn có 3 câu hỏi.

questions.text: Why is the woman calling?
Why does the man apologize?
options: A computer program is not working.

questions.text: What does the man remind the woman about?
What event will the speakers be attending later today?
Why does the man say, "she has a van"?
options: To suggest inquiring about a ride
To express surprise at a coworker's choice of vehicle
To explain why a coworker was late
To clarify that a coworker helped him move

questions.text: What will the woman most likely do next?
Where do the speakers work?
What does the woman say she is concerned about?
What does the man suggest that the woman do?
options: Take time to make a decision

questions.text: Why is the woman calling?
What event is the woman planning to attend?
What does the man give the woman as an apology?
Where does the woman work?
What problem with some e-mails does the man mention?
What will the woman most likely do next?
What is the conversation mainly about?
What does the woman say people at the company are currently working on?
Why is the man concerned?
What are the speakers preparing for?
What does the woman say will be delivered in an hour?
What will the speakers most likely do next?
What event are the speakers discussing?
What does the man mean when he says, "there's a lot of damage"?
options: He finally fully understands a problem.
The woman should expect a bill in the mail.
A schedule needs to be adjusted.

questions.text: What does the woman recommend?
What industry do the speakers most likely work in?
According to the man, why has a software program become popular?
options: It is less expensive than similar products.

questions.text: What might Marion still need to do?
What are the speakers discussing?
What challenge does Stan mention?
options: There are not enough job applicants.

questions.text: What does Pedro say he will do?
According to the man, why is today's Sea-Ride Special tour popular?
options: It offers a chance to see migrating birds.
Water conditions are likely to be favorable.
A guest chef is preparing lunch.
Someone special will be guiding the tour.

questions.text: Look at the graphic. What time will the woman depart on a tour?
What will the woman most likely do next?
options: Store her bags in a locker

questions.text: Why does the woman apologize?
Look at the graphic. Which location does the woman recommend?
Why is the man in a hurry?
options: A parking pass is about to expire.

questions.text: Why does the woman call?
options: She wants to request a refund.
She is unable to place an order online.
She wants to extend a deadline.
She is unhappy with a product purchased recently.

questions.text: Look at the graphic. What is the price of the item the woman wants to buy?
What will the man most likely do tomorrow?

parts.title: Talks
parts.description: Nghe các đoạn độc thoại như thông báo, bài phát biểu, lời nhắn thoại. Mỗi đoạn có 3 câu hỏi.

questions.text: What feature of a business does the speaker emphasize?
options: The extended hours it is open

questions.text: What can attendees do at the grand opening event?
What does the speaker advise event attendees to do?
What does the listener want to do?
Why does the speaker say, "those rooms are always booked far in advance"?
options: To express approval for a room design
To explain why a hotel is successful

questions.text: According to the speaker, what should the listener bring?
Who most likely is the speaker?
What does the speaker advise the listeners to do?
What does the speaker say she is going to do next?
Why will the speaker be traveling?
Why is the speaker concerned?
options: A company credit card was not charged.
Some meal tickets were not sent.
Her taxi driver is unable to find a hotel.

questions.text: What does the speaker ask the listener to do?
What does the speaker remind the listeners to do?
According to the speaker, what can the listeners apply for?
How can the listeners get information about future events?
options: By signing up for a newsletter
By looking at a Web site

questions.text: What service does the business offer?
According to the speaker, how is the business different from its competitors?
options: Its employees work one-on-one with clients.

questions.text: How can the listeners make an appointment?
Who most likely are the listeners?
What does the speaker mean when he says, "they received over 200 applications"?
options: An opportunity is unlikely to occur.
A decision will take longer than usual.
A competitor has been very successful.

questions.text: Why does the speaker say that work cannot begin right away?
options: An application has to be approved.
Some equipment needs to be ordered.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the talk?
options: To introduce new products to the public
To provide new employees with information

questions.text: Where is the talk taking place?
What does the speaker mean when she says, "I have a consultation with a client"?
options: She needs to reschedule a meeting.
She will not be with the listeners in the afternoon.
A customer has just placed a large order.
A marketing campaign will begin soon.

questions.text: What is the main purpose of the call?
Look at the graphic. Which model does the speaker prefer?
What does the speaker ask about?
Who most likely are the listeners?
Look at the graphic. What was the approval rating of the feature that will be improved?
According to the speaker, why is a revision urgent?
options: A competitor is making a similar product.
A product will be offered for sale soon.
A product will be introduced at a trade show.
The cost of a product's materials will rise soon.

parts.title: Incomplete Sentences
parts.description: Chọn từ/cụm từ phù hợp để hoàn thành câu. Kiểm tra ngữ pháp và từ vựng.

questions.text: When she held her last meeting, Ms. Toba ------- her sales staff to perform even better next quarter.
All staff have been informed ------- the proposed partnership with ERI Finance.
On Friday, Mr. Nakamura will discuss ------- ideas for supporting busy waiters.
The Forestry Commission was created to ------- the state's natural resources and wildlife.
By following established guidelines, construction workers will be able to complete their tasks -------.
With her numerous credentials, Dr. Kwan is highly ------- to teach medieval history at Maston University.
------- at the annual technology conference is mandatory for all engineers at the Treemont Corporation.
The café ------- features poets, folk singers, and drama groups on its stage.
Before the seminar began, attendees were assured ------- all scheduled presenters would appear.
Forever Pet has been a leader in bringing new products, ------- Fun Bone and Chew Right, to the market.
Ms. Turner is in charge of ------- the organization of records in the human services department.
Sheefon Bank clients always receive an e-mail or text ------- following any change to their account password.
A drop in consumer demand has led to a ------- decrease in the production of large pickup trucks.
After coating the potatoes in flour and spices, chefs should place them ------- into the deep fryer.
Several banks have released applications that allow ------- customers to pay bills easily by phone.
The personnel department will ------- only those applicants who have five or more years of experience for the position.
Employees of Belfore Electronics Ltd. are ------- involved in community-assistance programs.
The executives at Macalter Equipment decided they would not ------- the contract without major changes.
Wet suits are made with a ------- layer of rubber that traps heat and keeps divers warm.
Newcamp Services managers will meet to discuss the proposed ------- of three smaller branches into one large branch.
At Yarzen Technology, clients' records are ------- and can only be accessed by a small group of fund managers.
The featured panel at the NHJ Medical Conference will discuss recent ------- in online health-care services.
All of Millville's restaurants ------- several times a year by the city health department.
Sweet Sunlight Bakery has steadily built a ------- base of customers with its delicious cookies and cakes.
According to financial analysts, ------- in medical technology companies are expected to increase in value.
The city's harbor is ------- to container ships and fishing vessels of all sizes.
Maya's Dancewear expanded its advertising markets, and sales have ------- increased.
Dobson Ice Cream will not introduce any new flavors ------- the customer survey results are analyzed.
The renovated company gym ------- with free weights and exercise machines.
------- driving their cars, workers who travel to the town center should use the bus lines.

parts.title: Text Completion
parts.description: Điền từ/câu phù hợp vào chỗ trống trong đoạn văn. Mỗi đoạn có 4 câu hỏi.

questions.text: Select the best option for space [131].
questions.passage:
Local Barbershop Wins State Competition

By Miranda Warren

MALENDA COUNTY (January 12)—Pat and Kenny's Barbershop, [131] at 3949 Grand Street, has been named the best barbershop in the state by the Barber and Hairdresser's Coalition. The criteria for selection include reputation, affordability, professionalism, and accreditations.

[132].

Founders and owners Kenneth Webber and Patrick Miller have been best friends since childhood. [133] opened the shop 34 years ago. [134] the shop retains its old-fashioned charm, the barbers have mastered the latest styles, not just the more traditional ones. People of all ages seeking a haircut or a new style should try Pat and Kenny's Barbershop.

[134] the shop retains its old-fashioned charm, the barbers have mastered the latest styles, not just the more traditional ones. People of all ages seeking a haircut or a new style should try Pat and Kenny's Barbershop.
options: The results will be announced later this month.
We are proud to serve our community with excellence.
Pat and Kenny's shop excelled in all four categories.
Please call in advance to schedule an appointment.

questions.text: Select the best option for space [135].
questions.passage:
Gasgo Propane Tank Exchange

You have chosen a safe and [135] way to obtain fuel for your stoves, grills, heaters, fireplaces, or other devices. Simply follow the directions [136].

When your tank runs out of propane, take it to our store and leave it on one of the clearly marked green shelves outside the store. [137]. Then, pay the cashier inside the store for a fresh tank of propane. Next, the cashier or another staff member will accompany you to the outdoor exchange area. The staff person will give you a full tank to take home and provide help if you have multiple tanks to carry. Follow the instructions on the tank to connect it to your device.

Be sure to visit us again when you need a [138].

questions.text: Select the best option for space [139].
questions.passage:
To: Technicarn Enterprises Customers
From: Technicarn Enterprises Customer Service
Date: 10 September
Subject: Serving You

Dear Valued Customer:

We want your [139] with Technicarn Enterprises to be easy and enjoyable. To that end, we are pleased to announce our newly designed Web site, with enhanced customer-friendly features.

Our new Web site provides answers to your questions 24 hours a day, every day of the year.

On our home page, you can get information about system setup, or you can troubleshoot by visiting [140] the Internet Issues or TV and Streaming Issues pages. [141], you can find detailed information concerning account management, access, billing, and payment.

[142]. Please explore the new Web site at your earliest convenience: www.technicarnenterprises.com. As always, thank you for allowing us to serve you.

Best regards,

The Technicarn Enterprises Customer Service Team

questions.text: Select the best option for space [143].
questions.passage:
Garner City Transport Cares About the Environment

Beginning May 1, the sale and use of paper tickets and transit passes will be [143] on all Garner City Transport bus and subway lines. This change applies to single-ride tickets [144] to weekly and monthly passes. Eliminating paper benefits the environment and leads to less litter.

Riders can download the free Garner City Transport app. With the app, they can add money their accounts, purchase tickets, plan [145], and track arrival and departure times.

Alternatively, passengers can purchase a rechargeable transit card at any station. [146]. Value can be added to the card via the Garner City Transport Web site at www.garnercitytransport.org.

parts.title: Reading Comprehension
parts.description: Đọc hiểu các đoạn văn. Single Passages (29 câu) và Multiple Passages (25 câu).
